Lumify
Table of Contents

Class TodoListsController

Namespace
lumify.api.Controllers
Assembly
lumify.api.dll

Manages todo lists and their entries, both personal (no workspace) and workspace-shared, including creation, editing, deletion and various queries. All endpoints require an authenticated user. Changes to workspace items are pushed live to the workspace group over the TodoHub.

[ApiController]
[Route("todos/[action]")]
[Authorize]
public class TodoListsController : ControllerBase
Inheritance
object
ControllerBase
TodoListsController

Remarks

Status values are integers: 1 = pending/open, 2 = done. A list's status is kept in sync with its entries: checking the last open entry marks the list done, while adding or unchecking an entry reopens it. Permission rule throughout: a personal item may only be modified by its owner, a workspace item by any active member (see CanModify).

Constructors

TodoListsController(ILogger<TodoListsController>, LumifyDbContext, IHubContext<TodoHub>)

Creates the controller with its injected logger, database context and the todo hub used for live notifications.

public TodoListsController(ILogger<TodoListsController> logger, LumifyDbContext db, IHubContext<TodoHub> todoHub)

Parameters

logger ILogger<TodoListsController>
db LumifyDbContext
todoHub IHubContext<TodoHub>

Methods

AddTodoEntry(AddTodoEntryRequest, CancellationToken)

Adds a new entry (status 1 = pending) to a todo list.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addTodoEntry")]
public Task<ActionResult<TodoEntryResponse>> AddTodoEntry(AddTodoEntryRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddTodoEntryRequest

Entry data (name and parent list ID required; optional description).

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TodoEntryResponse>>

200 with the created entry; 400 if the name or list ID is missing or the list does not exist.

Remarks

If the parent list was already marked done (status 2), it is reopened. On success in a workspace, a TodoEntryCreated event (and a TodoListUpdated event if the list reopened) is broadcast to the workspace group.

AddTodoList(AddTodoListRequest, CancellationToken)

Creates a new todo list (status 1 = pending), optionally inside a workspace.

[HttpPost]
[ActionName("addTodoList")]
public Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>> AddTodoList(AddTodoListRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request AddTodoListRequest

List data (name required; optional workspace).

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>>

200 with the created list; 400 if the name is missing or the workspace does not exist.

Remarks

On success in a workspace, a TodoListCreated event is broadcast to the workspace group.

DeleteTodoEntry(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a todo entry.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteTodoEntry")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteTodoEntry(string todoEntryID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

todoEntryID string

The entry to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the entry ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not delete it; 404 if the entry or its parent list does not exist.

Remarks

The record is kept and marked with DeletedAt. On a workspace entry, a TodoEntryDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group.

DeleteTodoList(string, CancellationToken)

Soft-deletes a todo list.

[HttpDelete]
[ActionName("deleteTodoList")]
public Task<ActionResult> DeleteTodoList(string todoListID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

todoListID string

The list to delete.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult>

200 with success = true and the list ID; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user may not delete it; 404 if the list does not exist.

Remarks

The record is kept and marked with DeletedAt. On a workspace list, a TodoListDeleted event is broadcast to the workspace group.

GetAllTodoEntriesOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns all entries of the current user's personal todo lists (no workspace), oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllTodoEntriesOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<TodoEntryResponse>>> GetAllTodoEntriesOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<TodoEntryResponse>>>

200 with the list of entries.

GetAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all entries of all todo lists in a workspace, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<TodoEntryResponse>>> GetAllTodoEntriesOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace whose entries are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<TodoEntryResponse>>>

200 with the list of entries; 400 if the ID is missing.

GetAllTodoListsOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns all personal todo lists (no workspace) of the current user, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllTodoListsOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<TodoListResponse>>> GetAllTodoListsOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<TodoListResponse>>>

200 with the list of todo lists.

GetAllTodoListsOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns all todo lists of a workspace, oldest first.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getAllTodoListsOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<List<TodoListResponse>>> GetAllTodoListsOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace whose lists are requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<List<TodoListResponse>>>

200 with the list of todo lists; 400 if the ID is missing.

GetSpaceInfosOfTodoEntry(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the workspace that the given todo entry belongs to, if any. Used by the frontend's recents module to show where a recent item comes from.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getSpaceInfosOfTodoEntry")]
public Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>> GetSpaceInfosOfTodoEntry(string todoEntryID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

todoEntryID string

The entry whose workspace is requested.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<WorkspaceResponse>>

200 with the workspace; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if the entry has no linked workspace or it was deleted.

GetTodoListCountOfUser(CancellationToken)

Returns the number of personal todo lists (no workspace) owned by the current user. Used on the feature cards of the SpaceHub.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getTodoListCountOfUser")]
public Task<ActionResult<int>> GetTodoListCountOfUser(CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<int>>

200 with the list count.

GetTodoListCountOfWorkspace(string, CancellationToken)

Returns the number of todo lists in a workspace. The user must be a member. Used on the feature cards of the SpaceHub.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getTodoListCountOfWorkspace")]
public Task<ActionResult<int>> GetTodoListCountOfWorkspace(string workspaceID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

workspaceID string

The workspace to count lists for.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<int>>

200 with the list count; 400 if the ID is missing; 403 if the user is not a member; 404 if the workspace does not exist.

GetTodoListWithID(string, CancellationToken)

Returns a single todo list by its ID.

[HttpGet]
[ActionName("getTodoListWithID")]
public Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>> GetTodoListWithID(string todoListID, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

todoListID string

The list to look up.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>>

200 with the list; 400 if the ID is missing; 404 if it does not exist.

SaveTodoEntry(SaveTodoEntryRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates a todo entry's name, description and/or status (1 or 2). Only provided fields are changed, and the database is only written if something changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveTodoEntry")]
public Task<ActionResult<TodoEntryResponse>> SaveTodoEntry(SaveTodoEntryRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveTodoEntryRequest

The entry ID plus the fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TodoEntryResponse>>

200 with the updated entry; 400 on invalid input (e.g. status not 1/2); 403 if the user may not modify it; 404 if the entry or its parent list does not exist.

Remarks

Toggling the status keeps the parent list in sync: checking the last open entry marks the list done, unchecking an entry reopens it. The response's WasLastUnchecked flag signals the former. Relevant TodoEntryUpdated/TodoListUpdated events are broadcast to the workspace group.

SaveTodoList(SaveTodoListRequest, CancellationToken)

Updates a todo list's name, status (1 or 2) and/or archived flag. Only provided fields are changed, and the database is only written if something changed.

[HttpPatch]
[ActionName("saveTodoList")]
public Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>> SaveTodoList(SaveTodoListRequest request, CancellationToken ct)

Parameters

request SaveTodoListRequest

The list ID plus the fields to change.

ct CancellationToken

Cancellation token for the request.

Returns

Task<ActionResult<TodoListResponse>>

200 with the updated list; 400 on invalid input (e.g. status not 1/2); 403 if the user may not modify it; 404 if the list does not exist.

Remarks

On a successful change in a workspace, a TodoListUpdated event is broadcast to the workspace group.
